regsensitivity 0.1.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • More articles...
  • Changelog

Package index

Main analyses

regsensitivity()
Regression sensitivity analysis
regsen_bounds()
Bounds on a regression coefficient under omitted-variable bias
regsen_breakdown()
Breakdown frontier for a regression coefficient hypothesis
regsen_summary()
Sensitivity summary (DMP bounds + Oster breakdown)

Inference

regsen_boot()
Bootstrap confidence interval for the breakdown point

Calibration

calibrate_rho()
Calibration parameters rho_k for rxbar
calibrate_partial_r2()
Pairwise partial R-squared of calibration covariates

Helpers

bnd_lb() bnd_ub() bnd_eq()
Hypothesis-direction helpers

Visualization

plot(<regsensitivity>)
Plot a regression sensitivity analysis

Data

bfg2020
Bazzi, Fiszbein and Gebresilasse (2020) "Frontier Culture" replication data

Package

regsensitivity-package
regsensitivity: regression sensitivity analysis

On this page

Developed by Mike Nguyen.
